enonce.texte: Match the words on the left with their correct definitions on the right to review key vocabulary related to academic performance.

questions.texte: Match the following terms with their definitions.

sousQuestions.reponse: d. A score or mark given to a student's work.
a. A formal test of a student's knowledge.
b. Financial aid given to a student to support their studies.
e. An award given for a great achievement.

enonce.texte:
Complete the sentences below with the correct words from the box to demonstrate your understanding of assessment vocabulary.

Words: exam, grade, score, test, success, scholarship, outstanding, prize

questions.texte: Fill in the blanks with the most appropriate word.
questions.reponse: 1. exam, 2. score, 3. grade, 4. outstanding, 5. scholarship, 6. success

sousQuestions.texte: The final _______ in mathematics will take place next week.
Her _______ on the test was the highest in the class.
My teacher gave me a good _______ for my essay.
He received an _______ mark for his final project.
She won a _______ to study abroad because of her brilliant academic record.
Hard work and dedication are the keys to _______ in school.

enonce.texte:
Read the text about academic performance and answer the questions that follow.

"In many Cameroonian schools, students' academic performance is evaluated through continuous assessments and final examinations. The government and school authorities often reward students with outstanding results through prizes and scholarships. However, many students face challenges such as lack of resources, which affects their grades and overall school success. To improve performance, educational stakeholders suggest that students should adopt effective study habits and participate actively in class."

questions.texte: Based on the text, what are the main types of evaluation used in many Cameroonian schools?
How do school authorities encourage students who perform very well?
questions.reponse: They reward them through prizes and scholarships.

questions.texte: According to the text, what is one major challenge affecting students' academic performance?
What recommendations are given to students to improve their academic performance?
questions.reponse: To adopt effective study habits and participate actively in class.

questions.texte: From the text, identify three keywords related to the lesson 'Academic Performance' and provide a synonym for each.

intitule: Writing a Report on Academic Success

enonce.texte:
You are a student representative on the school committee. Using the vocabulary and concepts learned in this lesson, write a report to the principal suggesting ways to improve academic performance in your school.

Your report should include:

  • An introduction explaining the importance of academic success.
  • Challenges students face (at least 3).
  • Suggestions to overcome these challenges (at least 3).
  • A conclusion highlighting the expected benefits.

questions.texte: Write a coherent report using appropriate academic vocabulary and a formal tone.
questions.reponse: Students should produce a structured report using lesson-specific vocabulary such as exam, grades, scholarship, outstanding, success, and recommendations. The report should be clear, well-organized, and persuasive.
